violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Observed open bag of bacon stored underneath flat of eggs. Bacon not stored to prevent contamination.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed hamburger patties and chicken drummies stored on the floor in freezer.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Observed brisket stored on top of packages of buns in freezer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed food build up around grills and prep tables. Need to be clean more frequently.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed on sides, bottom, top of clean in place equipment, prep tables, in drawers, cold hold station contained build up of food and debris.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Observed dust, debris and grease build up on filters and inside of hood system.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Observed restrooms do not have self closing doors.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor, walls and ceilings need to be cleaned more frequently.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. Ceiling in dishwasher area was missing tiles.

Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. Eggs in the walk in cooler were obtained from a producer that is not licensed. Owner took the eggs home. Eggs must be purchased from a licensed provider.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Shell eggs, removed from the original container, were stored over ready to eat food items in the reach in cooler by the fryers. These eggs must be treated as a raw product and stored below ready to eat foods.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. A wet wiping cloth was stored on the steam table. This must be stored in sanitizer when not in use.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. The wooden board for the potato slicer is bare wood. This is not a cleanable surface. This needs to be painted/ sealed.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. A wrench was being used to turn on the hot water for the hand sink by the door to the kitchen. This valve must be repaired.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Hand sink by fryers had items stored in front of it not allowing easy use. These items must not be stored in front of the hand sink.--Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. A strainer and steel wool were stored in the hand sink by the fryers. A sanitize bucket was being stored in the front hand sink. Hand sinks must be used only for hand washing.

Toilet facilities. — --* Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. The doors to the restrooms are not self closing. These restrooms are next to the front service areas. These doors must be self closing.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Ceiling tile in the dish area are missing with exposed ceiling. There was a missing floor tile by the door to the kitchen from the service area.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. A mop was stored in the bottom of the mop sink and not in a position to dry. This mop must be stored in a position to dry.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
